report_name: Microsoft's April 2026 Patch Tuesday Addresses 167 Vulnerabilities, Including Actively Exploited SharePoint Flaw and Publicly Disclosed Defender Bug

attack_patterns.name: Exploitation for Privilege Escalation
attack_patterns.description: The BlueHammer exploit for CVE-2026-33825 allows a locally authenticated attacker to escalate privileges to SYSTEM level.

attack_patterns.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
attack_patterns.description: An actively exploited spoofing vulnerability (CVE-2026-32201) in Microsoft SharePoint Server allows an unauthenticated, remote attacker to perform a spoofing attack.

malware.name: BlueHammer
malware.description: A publicly disclosed PoC exploit for the Microsoft Defender privilege escalation vulnerability (CVE-2026-33825). It allows a locally authenticated attacker to gain SYSTEM-level privileges.

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-32201
vulnerabilities.description: A spoofing vulnerability in Microsoft SharePoint Server due to improper input validation, allowing an unauthenticated remote attacker to perform a spoofing attack. This vulnerability is actively exploited in the wild and has been added to CISA's KEV catalog.
vulnerabilities.kev_required_action: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
vulnerabilities.cisa_vuln_name: Microsoft SharePoint Server Improper Input Validation Vulnerability

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-33825
vulnerabilities.description: A publicly disclosed privilege escalation vulnerability in the Microsoft Defender anti-malware platform. A locally authenticated attacker can exploit this flaw to gain SYSTEM-level privileges. A PoC exploit known as 'BlueHammer' is available.

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-33824
vulnerabilities.description: A remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability in the Windows Internet Key Exchange (IKE) Service. An unauthenticated attacker could send a specially crafted IP packet to a target machine to achieve remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-33827
vulnerabilities.description: A race condition vulnerability in the Windows TCP/IP stack that could lead to remote code execution (RCE).

indicators.name: Microsoft Defender Suspicious Child Process
indicators.pattern:
title: Microsoft Defender Suspicious Child Process
id: 8b1a9c4d-3e5f-4b1a-8c9d-0e1f2a3b4c5d
status: experimental
description: Detects suspicious child processes spawning from the Microsoft Defender service (MsMpEng.exe), which could indicate exploitation of privilege escalation vulnerabilities like CVE-2026-33825 (BlueHammer).
references:
  - https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/microsoft/microsoft-april-2026-patch-tuesday-fixes-167-flaws-2-zero-days/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-15
tags:
  - attack.t1068
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: '\MsMpEng.exe'
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects suspicious child processes (powershell.exe, cmd.exe) spawning from the Microsoft Defender service (MsMpEng.exe), which could indicate exploitation of privilege escalation vulnerabilities like CVE-2026-33825.

indicators.name: Microsoft Defender Service Crash
indicators.pattern:
title: Microsoft Defender Service Crash
id: f9a8b7c6-d5e4-4f3a-2b1c-0d9e8f7a6b5c
status: experimental
description: Detects crashes of the Microsoft Defender service (MsMpEng.exe), which could indicate attempts to exploit vulnerabilities like CVE-2026-33825.
references:
  - https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/microsoft/microsoft-april-2026-patch-tuesday-fixes-167-flaws-2-zero-days/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-15
tags:
  - attack.t1068
level: medium
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: application
detection:
  selection:
    Provider_Name: 'Application Error'
    EventID: 1000
    Data|contains:
      - 'Faulting application name: MsMpEng.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects crashes of the Microsoft Defender service (MsMpEng.exe) by looking for Application Error events (Event ID 1000), which could be a sign of exploitation attempts against vulnerabilities like CVE-2026-33825.
